hooks.command: echo '[java-core] Detecting Java project...' && (cat pom.xml 2>/dev/null | grep -E '<java.version>|<maven.compiler.source>' | head -2 || cat build.gradle 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'sourceCompatibility|JavaVersion' | head -2 || echo '[java-core] No build file found — ask user for Java version if needed.')
echo '[java-core] Java file edited. Reminder: run mvn compile -q or ./gradlew build -q to verify the build still passes.'
echo '[java-core] Did you add or update tests for this change? Check for a corresponding *Test.java file.'
echo '[java-core] After committing, consider running mvn verify or ./gradlew check for a full quality gate.'
